insight: `@announce`/`@warn`/`@error`/`@info`/`@question`/`@success` prefixes in arena console commands (End_Commands, Finish_Commands, etc.) crash with "Cannot use @announce without a player" because `ArenaCommands.runConsole()` passed null instead of the player to `Platform.dispatchConsoleCommand()`. These `@` prefixes are inherently per-player and need a player context even when `Console_Commands_For_Each` is false.
